title: Aye Mr Minor Lyrics Kaaviyathalaivan Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Aye Mr Minor Song Lyrics From Kaaviyathalaivan
Singer(s): Haricharan, Shashaa Tirpathi

Hei.. Hey Mr Minor Enna Paakura
En Iravugalai Imsai Aaka Ninaikura
Kaatrin Kaalil Kolusu Katti Anupura
Kaathalai Kai Kuluki Izhukura

Hey Mr Minor Enna Paakura
En Iravugalai Imsai Aaka Ninaikura
Kaatrin Kaalil Kolusu Katti Anupura
Kaathalai Kai Kuluki Izhukura

Ennai Unakku Rasiganaaga Maathura
Un Azhagai Thinamum Nooru Madangu Kootura
Kangal Pattu Pogum Endru Ninaikira
Nenjile Thangi Kondu Sirikira

Hey Mr Minor Enna Paakura
En Iravugalai Imsai Aaka Ninaikura
Kaatrin Kaalil Kolusu Katti Anupura
Kaathalai Kai Kuluki Izhukura

Aasaigal Unnodu Nenjai Thatti Etti Paarkuthu
Aadai Otti Paarkuthu
Pesathaan Nenjodu Vaarthai Kenji Konjuthu
Vaai Pesa Vaai Thaayen
Imagalai Thirakuthey Kanavugal
Ithazhgalai Nenaikuthey Iravugal
Malargalai Udaikuthey Panithugal
Neeyum Naanum Serum Neram Meerum Neram

Hey Mr Minor Enna Paakura
Èn Iravugalai Imsai Aaka Ninaikura
Kaatrin Kaalil Kolusu Katti Anupura
Kaathalai Kai Kuluki Izhukura

Ohh.. Ènnai Unakku Rasiganaaga Maathura
Un Azhagai Thinamum Nooru Madangu Kootura
Kangal Pattu Pogum Endru Ninaikira
Nenjile Thangi Kondu Sirikira..

Ennamo Ennodu Kichu Kichu Muttipoguthu
Kannam Pichu Poduthu
Kannamo Thannodu Mutham Pichai Kekuthu
Thaan Ithazh Thaayen..
Muthal Murai Paravuthey Paravasam
Thodanganum Malarvanam Ivalvasam
Idaiveli Kurainthapin Ithazhrasam
kankavilndhu meiyapothu  Nenjin Meethu

Ohh.. Ennai Unakku Rasiganaaga Maathura
Un Azhagai Thinamum Nooru Madangu Kootura
Kangal Pattu Pogum Endru Ninaikira
Nenjile Thangi Kondu Sirikira..

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Aye Mr Minor'?

The song 'Aye Mr Minor' expresses the playful and romantic feelings of youth, showcasing the charm of love and attraction.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In Kaaviya Thalaivan, this song reflects the light-hearted moments between the lead characters, highlighting their budding romance amidst the backdrop of a theatrical setting.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song features the talented voices of Haricharan and Shashaa Tirpathi, who bring the lyrics to life with their captivating performances.

Who composed the music for 'Aye Mr Minor'?

The music for this song was composed by the renowned AR Rahman, known for his innovative and melodious compositions in Tamil cinema.

When was 'Aye Mr Minor' released?

'Aye Mr Minor' was released on November 27, 2014, as part of the movie Kaaviya Thalaivan.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song 'Aye Mr Minor' from the movie Kaaviya Thalaivan is a lively duet that encapsulates the joy and excitement of young love. With its upbeat tempo and romantic lyrics, the song conveys a sense of playful flirtation and happiness. The collaboration between Haricharan and Shashaa Tirpathi, under the musical genius of AR Rahman, creates an infectious energy that resonates with listeners. This track is perfect for celebrations and moments of joy, making it a delightful addition to any playlist.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Aye Mr Minor from Kaaviya Thalaivan is a vibrant duet that beautifully captures the essence of youthful romance. With the enchanting voices of Haricharan and Shashaa Tirpathi, this song is a delightful blend of melody and energy, perfectly crafted by the legendary AR Rahman. Dive into the lively beats and captivating lyrics that make this track a must-listen for any music lover!
stanzaMeanings: Hey Mr. Minor, what are you looking at? My dreams are becoming a reality. In the breeze, I tie anklets and send them to you, while my hands are trembling.
Hey Mr. Minor, what are you looking at? My dreams are becoming a reality. In the breeze, I tie anklets and send them to you, while my hands are trembling.
I am your fan, your beauty is like Mathura. Every day, my heart thinks that a hundred stars will fall, and it smiles with joy.
Hey Mr. Minor, what are you looking at? My dreams are becoming a reality. In the breeze, I tie anklets and send them to you, while my hands are trembling.

Your desires are touching my heart. I see them and feel them. Words are not spoken, but my heart is speaking. Mother, these dreams are opening up. The nights are like flowers, and the moments are flowing together.
Hey Mr. Minor, what are you looking at? My dreams are becoming a reality. In the breeze, I tie anklets and send them to you, while my hands are trembling.
Oh, I am your fan, your beauty is like Mathura. Every day, my heart thinks that a hundred stars will fall, and it smiles with joy.

I don't know, but I feel a little shy. My eyes are blushing, and I am asking for a kiss. This is the first time I am feeling this way. I want to spread my wings and fly, and when I come down, I want to see the truth in my heart.
Oh, I am your fan, your beauty is like Mathura. Every day, my heart thinks that a hundred stars will fall, and it smiles with joy.
Hey Mr. Minor, what are you looking at? My dreams are becoming a reality. In the breeze, I tie anklets and send them to you, while my hands are trembling.
